top3.sql:
SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton')
ORDER BY res.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'
)
AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.rank ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton')
ORDER BY res.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'
)
AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.rank ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.rank ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton')
ORDER BY res.position ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (
    SELECT driverId 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton'
)
AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.rank ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Lewis' AND d.surname = 'Hamilton'
  AND res.rank IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.rank ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT r.name
FROM results res
JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
WHERE res.driverId = (SELECT driverId FROM drivers WHERE forename = 'Lewis' AND surname = 'Hamilton')
ORDER BY res.position ASC
LIMIT 1;
